nasb.text: And He came up and touched the coffin; and the bearers came to a halt. And He said, “Young man, I say to you, arise!”

esv.text: Then he came up and touched the bier, and the bearers stood still. And he said, “Young man, I say to you, arise.”

cnv.text: 於是上前按著槓子，抬的人就站住。他說：“青年人，我吩咐你起來！”

ccb.text: 随即上前按住抬尸架，抬的人停了下来。耶稣说：“年轻人，我吩咐你起来！”

csbs.text: 于是耶稣上前去，按着棺架，抬棺架的人就停住了。耶稣说：“年轻人，我吩咐你起来！”
